title: Rumohra × subreflexipinna

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving antioxidant defenses, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. The bioactive constituents of Rumohra × subreflexipinna include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Rumohra × subreflexipinna is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems.
